articles.title: Lululemon names former Nike exec Heidi O’Neill as next CEO
articles.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. has appointed former Nike executive Heidi O’Neill as its next chief executive officer, effective September 8th. This decision comes after months of criticism regarding the company's management and performance, including pressure from founder Chip Wilson. O'Neill's extensive experience at Nike and other brands is expected to help Lululemon strengthen its brand relevance and accelerate growth amid increasing competition.

articles.title: lululemon Names Proven Brand Builder Heidi O’Neill as Chief Executive Officer
articles.summary: lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) has announced the appointment of Heidi O’Neill as its new Chief Executive Officer, effective September 8, 2026. O'Neill brings over three decades of experience, including a significant tenure at Nike, Inc., where she played a key role in its growth. She is tasked with accelerating product breakthroughs, deepening brand relevance, and unlocking global market growth for lululemon.

She is tasked with accelerating product breakthroughs, deepening brand relevance, and unlocking global market growth for lululemon.

articles.title: Dick’s Sporting Goods EVP sells $925k in stock
articles.summary: Julie Lodge-Jarrett, EVP at DICK’S Sporting Goods, sold over $925,000 in company stock on April 17, 2026, while also acquiring shares through stock option exercises. The transactions were reported to the SEC on April 21, 2026. This comes as Dick's Sporting Goods receives positive analyst ratings and strong sales reports for Nike running shoes, even as Goldman Sachs adjusts consumer spending forecasts.
